when.test: searchType == null or searchType == '' or searchType == '전체'

choose.when: (구직번호 LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR 상담사 LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%' OR 참여자 LIKE '%' + #{searchKeyword} + '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT 구직번호 AS jobNumber, 상담사 AS counselor, 참여자 AS participant, 성별 AS gender, 주소 AS address, 학교명 AS schoolName, 나이 AS age, 자격증 AS certificate, IIF(희망연봉 <= 0,'회사내규에 따름',CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),희망연봉)) AS desiredSalary, 고유번호 AS uniqueNumber FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY 구직번호 DESC) AS RowNum, 구직번호, 상담사, 상담사_아이디, 참여자, 성별, 주소, 학교명, 나이, 자격증, 희망연봉, 고유번호 FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT
GROUP BY 구직번호, 상담사, 상담사_아이디, 참여자, 성별, 주소, 학교명, 나이, 자격증, 희망연봉, 고유번호 ) AS SUB_QUERY WHERE SUB_QUERY.RowNum>#{startPage} AND #{endPage} >= SUB_QUERY.RowNum
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT 구직번호) AS totalCount FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT

SELECT DISTINCT 구직번호 AS jobNumber, 지점 AS counselorBranch, 상담사 AS counselor, 상담사_아이디 AS counselorId, 참여자 AS participant, 성별 AS gender, 생년월일 AS birthDate, 주소 AS address, 학교명 AS schoolName, 전공 AS major, 경력 AS career, 나이 AS age, 자격증 AS certificate, IIF(희망연봉 <= 0,'회사내규에 따름',CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),희망연봉)) AS desiredSalary, 상담사이메일 AS email, 고유번호 AS uniqueNumber, 상세정보 AS placementDetail, 추천사 AS suggestionDetail, 키워드 AS recommendedKeyword, 상담사전화번호 AS counselorPhone FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber}
SELECT DISTINCT 구직번호 AS jobNumber FROM dbo.EXTERNALPARTICIPANT WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber} AND 상담사_아이디 = #{counselorId}
mapper.update: UPDATE J_참여자관리 SET 참여자=#{participant}, 생년월일=#{birthDate}, 성별=#{gender}, 주소=#{address}, 희망급여=#{desiredSalary}, 학교명=#{schoolName}, 전공=#{major}, 경력=#{career}, 참여자_수정일=GETDATE() WHERE 구직번호=#{jobNumber} AND 전담자_계정 = #{counselorId};
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_희망직무 (구직번호, 희망순위, 희망직무, 직무_카테고리_대, 직무_카테고리_중, 등록일시) VALUES
(#{jobNumber}, #{job.desiredJobRank}, #{job.desiredJob}, #{job.jobCategoryLarge}, #{job.jobCategoryMid}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT 등록번호 AS placementDetailNumber, 상세정보 AS placementDetail FROM J_참여자관리_알선상세정보 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_알선상세정보 (구직번호, 상세정보, 등록일, 수정일) VALUES (#{jobNumber},#{placementDetail},GETDATE(),GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE J_참여자관리_알선상세정보 SET 상세정보 = #{placementDetail}, 수정일 = GETDATE() WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_이력서요청양식 (구직번호, 기업명, 담당자명, 이메일, 비상연락처, 기타요청사항, 상태, 등록일, 수정일, 기업개인정보처리동의, 기업담당자개인정보처리동의, 마케팅개인정보사용동의) VALUES (#{jobNumber}, #{companyName}, #{contactName}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactOther}, '요청', GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{companyPrivacy}, #{contactPrivacy}, #{marketingConsent})
mapper.select: SELECT 전담자_계정 AS counselorId, 참여자 AS participant FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT 구직번호) AS totalCount FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT WHERE ( 희망직무 LIKE '%슈퍼바이저%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%바리스타%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%Supervisor%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%Barista%' )

SELECT 구직번호 AS jobNumber, 상담사 AS counselor, 참여자 AS participant, 성별 AS gender, 주소 AS address, 학교명 AS schoolName, 나이 AS age, 자격증 AS certificate, IIF(희망연봉 <= 0, '회사내규에 따름', CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), 희망연봉)) AS desiredSalary, 고유번호 AS uniqueNumber FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY 구직번호 DESC) AS RowNum, 구직번호, 상담사, 참여자, 성별, 주소, 학교명, 나이, 자격증, 희망연봉, 고유번호 FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT WHERE ( 희망직무 LIKE '%슈퍼바이저%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%바리스타%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%Supervisor%' OR 희망직무 LIKE '%Barista%' ) GROUP BY 구직번호, 상담사, 참여자, 성별, 주소, 학교명, 나이, 자격증, 희망연봉, 고유번호 ) AS SUB_QUERY WHERE SUB_QUERY.RowNum > #{startPage} AND #{endPage} >= SUB_QUERY.RowNum
SELECT 희망순위 AS desiredJobRank, 직무_카테고리_대 AS jobCategoryLarge, 직무_카테고리_중 AS jobCategoryMid, 희망직무 AS desiredJob FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT WHERE 구직번호 = #{jobNumber} ORDER BY 희망순위
